gist.headline: Sidebar companion acquired
gist.blurb: The AI Companion app just sprouted in the greenhouse. Keep a brainstorming buddy in your sidebar while you build.
gist.summary: Added the AI Companion app to the community showcase, providing generative writing and task assistance alongside other apps.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and integrate a dedicated AI assistant into their sidebar for seamless brainstorming.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot sitting next to a glowing sidebar interface, working together on a document. Represents the 'AI Companion' in the sidebar.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head sitting next to a glowing lime green (#ecf874) sidebar interface. The robot is holding a tiny clipboard and helping the bee write notes. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.
